review_text: Average experience. Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were fine but Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) was a bit bland. Room for improvement.
Great food overall. Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Naan  Malai Kofta  and Mango Lassi were tasty  especially the Gulab Jamun (2 pcs). Would order again!
Exceptional quality! Ordered Vegetable Biryani  Tandoori Roti  and Chicken Biryani and everything was delicious. The Vegetable Biryani melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Hands down the best Lamb Rogan Josh I've ever had! Sweet Lassi  Samosa (2 pcs)  and Lamb Rogan Josh were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Best Indian food in UAE! Masala Chai were incredible. Masala Chai had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
Poor experience. Lamb Rogan Josh  Tandoori Roti  and Garlic Naan were disappointing. Lamb Rogan Josh was burnt on the edges. Very unhappy.
